sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107864" key="u(pe/rspoudos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπέρσπουδ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107864.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exceedingly nervous</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">earnest,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
